SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter
Scatter/gather splitter contracts and context types.
com.societegenerale.failover.lookup
Spring BeanFactory-based lookups that resolve the named KeyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy and PayloadSplitter beans referenced by Failover.keyGenerator(), Failover.expiryPolicy() and Failover.payloadSplitter().
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter used by com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
    Class
    Description
    PayloadSplitterLookup
    Strategy for resolving a PayloadSplitter by qualifier or bean name.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter used by com.societegenerale.failover.core
    Class
    Description
    PayloadSplitterLookup
    Strategy for resolving a PayloadSplitter by qualifier or bean name.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter used by com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter
    Class
    Description
    AbstractPayloadSplitter
    Template-method base class for PayloadSplitter implementations that removes the boilerplate of building StoreContext / RecoverContext slices and of merging recovered slices back into a composite result.
    MergeResult
    Value object returned by AbstractPayloadSplitter.mergeSlices(List, List) carrying the outcome of merging recovered slices back into a composite.
    PayloadSplitter
    Strategy that splits a composite payload into individual slices for scatter/gather operations.
    RecoverContext
    Mutable context passed to PayloadSplitter.splitOnRecover(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.RecoverContext<T>) and PayloadSplitter.merge(java.util.List<com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.RecoverContext<R>>).
    StoreContext
    Immutable context passed to PayloadSplitter.splitOnStore(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.StoreContext<T>) and produced by it.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter used by com.societegenerale.failover.lookup
    Class
    Description
    PayloadSplitter
    Strategy that splits a composite payload into individual slices for scatter/gather operations.
    PayloadSplitterLookup
    Strategy for resolving a PayloadSplitter by qualifier or bean name.
